tool.title: 3D Scalar Field Viewer
tool.about: Computes a 3D Gaussian scalar field f(x,y,z) = exp(-r²/σ²) on a regular grid and visualises it as a coloured point cloud.

about.label: Gaussian Width σ
about.description: Standard deviation of the Gaussian blob.

about.label: Grid Points per Axis
about.description: Number of sample points along each axis (total = npts³).

about.label: Center X
about.description: X coordinate of the Gaussian centre.

about.label: Center Y
about.description: Y coordinate of the Gaussian centre.

about.label: Center Z
about.description: Z coordinate of the Gaussian centre.
